name: Anise Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, corn syrup, boiling water, and cream of tartar in a medium-heavy saucepan.
2. Boil until the mixture spins a thread or reaches 200°F on a candy thermometer.
3. Add food coloring and anise oil (or anise extract). Stir to combine.
4. Pour the mixture into a buttered 9x9-inch pan.
5. Cut into 3/4 inch squares when partially hardened, or when it breaks into jagged pieces.
6. May be rolled in confectioner's sugar.
